title: Many And More Ores++ ||REBORN||
description: Adds (Obivously) Alot of ores with there respective tools, but not only that, it will also have many biomes,new blocks woodtypes and more. - Now Backk
body:
**🔨 Many and More Ores++ ||REBORN||**

**HELLO, MANY AND MORE ORE WAS A PROJECT THAT I WORKED ON BUT EVENTUALLY STOPPED AND LOST THE FILES OF, AS SUCH ITT WILL BE REPLACEDD WITH A NEW MOD WITH THE SAME CONCEPT BUT MORE BALANCED AND HIGHER QUALITY, VERSION V1 and V1.5.2 CURRENTLY EXISITING ARE FROM PREVIOUS MOD, A NEW 2.0 HAS BEEN RELEASED WHICH HOLDS THE NOW NEW VERSION OF MOD**

More ores, more gear, and way more chaos.

**Many and More Ores++ is a WIP expansion mod that currently adds a wide variety of custom ores, each with their own unique tools and uses. Whether you're mining deep underground or just getting started, there's always something new to dig up.**

_But we're just getting started._

In future updates, expect:

**More ores**

**Custom tools and armor sets**

**New blocks and wood types**

**Dimensions and biomes to explore**

**Possibly mobs and bosses down the line**
